laws.title: Surrender of certificate, arms etc. by persons ceasing to be members of the Force
laws.description: Requires members leaving the force to surrender certificates, arms, and other issued items; failure to do so is punishable.
laws.simpleExplanation: If a CISF member leaves service and does not return official items like weapons or certificates, they can be punished.

punishments.description: Imprisonment up to one month or fine up to 200 rupees or both.

laws.title: Penalties for neglect of duty etc.
laws.description: Punishes members for violation of duty, neglect, unauthorized absence, or misconduct.
laws.simpleExplanation: If a CISF member neglects duty, disobeys orders, or behaves improperly, they can face punishment.
